parameters.query: =INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, log_level, message, details) VALUES ('error-handler', '{{ $json.severity === 'critical' ? 'error' : $json.severity === 'high' ? 'warning' : 'info' }}', 'Hata: {{ ($json.error_message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}');
